title: The First Rift
artPrompt: Premium fantasy comic COVER, no text/logos. Elara Venn with glowing egg before cyan Prime Gateway tear over mud that will be Commons; Bramblefox and Mossprig silhouettes. Earth tones, cyan accent. 3:4. Original Riftwilds IP only. NO dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, or UI in the image.

lines.text: When the Prime broke, a courier chose to keep.
